calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kathryn Shantz, Plaintiff
Tony Van Hoorebeke, defendant, with witnesses Sean Castillo and Ivan Resnikoff.

This comes on regularly for small claims court. All parties and witnesses sworn.

Kathryn Shantz testifies on behalf of herself.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
1. Account reseipt for computer.
2. Receipt for shipping.
3. email between K. Shantz and Sony Corp.
4. Letter from K. Shantz to UPS.
5. Agreement between client and K. Shantz. (May)
6. UPS Parcel Shipping Order.

Tony Van Hoorebeke testifies on behalf of himself.
Sean Castillo testifies on behalf of defendant.
Ivan Resnikoff testifies on behalf of the defenant.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
A. Return receipt.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission
Judge: J. Stewart; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not reported

CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Set For Trial On Aug-04-09 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 505
